title: クレーンゲーム大成功！

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The time spent in my shining presence has given
rise to your knightly skill. Be grateful!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now, we must return home at once to prepare a
stage! These little ones have waited long enough!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ah, I know! I'll prepare the best seat in the house
for you, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Yes, you'll be put in the center of the front row!
As a reward for that brilliant rescue, you may
bask in my radiance to your heart's content!
